content:
# 组合模式：详情页

## 适用场景

展示单条数据完整信息的页面，如商品详情、订单详情、文章详情。顶部大图/标题，中部信息分组（标签+值成对），底部操作按钮。

## 组合方式

外层 CombinedView（layoutMode=flex, direction=column）。顶部 ImageView 大图 + TextView 标题。中部若干「信息行」CombinedView（direction=row, space-between）：左标签 TextView + 右值 TextView。底部操作按钮 TextView 绑定 onClick。

## AI Projection 示例

```json
{
  "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
  "id": "detail-page",
  "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
  "size": { "width": 375, "height": 667 },
  "layoutMode": "flex",
  "flexLayout": { "direction": "column", "crossAxisAlignment": "stretch", "gap": 12, "padding": [0, 0, 16, 0] },
  "children": [
    { "type": "IMAGEVIEW", "id": "detail-cover", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 375, "height": 240 }, "src": "https://example.com/detail.png" },
    { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "detail-title", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 343, "height": 28 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "商品名称", "style": { "fontSize": 20, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#1a1a1a" } } ] } ] } },
    {
      "type": "COMBINEDVIEW",
      "id": "detail-row-price",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 343, "height": 24 },
      "layoutMode": "flex",
      "flexLayout": { "direction": "row", "mainAxisAlignment": "space-between", "crossAxisAlignment": "center", "padding": [0, 16, 0, 16] },
      "children": [
        { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "detail-label-price", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 100, "height": 22 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "价格", "style": { "fontSize": 14, "color": "#999999" } } ] } ] } },
        { "type": "TEXTVIEW", "id": "detail-value-price", "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 }, "size": { "width": 100, "height": 22 }, "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "¥99.00", "style": { "fontSize": 14, "color": "#ff4d4f" } } ], "align": "right" } ] } }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "TEXTVIEW",
      "id": "detail-action",
      "transform": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
      "size": { "width": 343, "height": 44 },
      "decoration": { "fill": { "color": "#1677ff" }, "radius": 8 },
      "content": { "paragraphs": [ { "elements": [ { "text": "立即购买", "style": { "fontSize": 16, "color": "#ffffff", "fontWeight": "bold" } } ], "align": "center" } ] },
      "events": { "onClick": null }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 依赖的 Primitive

primitive-ui-combinedview, primitive-ui-imageview, primitive-ui-textview

## 说明

- 详情页数据通常来自 Scene 的 onLoad 生命周期加载（见 bindflow 组合模式 composition-bindflow-page-init）。
- 信息行可重复多组（价格、库存、规格等）。

metadata.description: 单条数据详情页：大图+信息行+操作按钮
